name: imagen-design-hub
description: MiriCanvas and DesignHub asset workflows for PNG elements, JPG backgrounds, SVG/GIF beta routes, image-gen source creation, and PNG fringe QA.

interface.shortDescription: Prepare DesignHub PNG, JPG, SVG, GIF, and CSV assets.
interface.longDescription: Route MiriCanvas DesignHub work into focused flows for PNG elements, JPG backgrounds, SVG beta elements, GIF beta elements, and post-upload CSV metadata. The plugin defaults generation work to the installed $image-gen skill, reuses the copied chroma-key helper for PNG elements, adds magenta-fringe QA plus breeze/air outline guidance for transparent effects, and keeps DesignHub upload/download actions on the user-requested live surface such as Aside on macOS or MCP when available.
defaultPrompt: Use $image-gen to prepare PNG elements for DesignHub.
Run png-element chroma cleanup and fringe QA.
Use the requested DesignHub upload surface; Aside is macOS-only and MCP is the next preferred automation route.
